title: Metering Ledger Contract v0
purpose: Define the future Alpha Feed API key usage-accounting ledger contract without enabling live metering, customer access, billing, payment, or runtime delivery.

future_event_fields.name: idempotency_key
future_event_fields.description: Stable deduplication key for replay-safe append attempts.

future_event_fields.name: actor_type
future_event_fields.description: Coarse actor class such as system, admin, or future_api_key_reference.

future_event_fields.name: key_id_reference
future_event_fields.description: Non-secret opaque API key reference only; never plaintext, bearer credential, hash, or hash internals.

future_event_fields.name: project_scope
future_event_fields.description: Public-safe project or feed scope when needed, never private project data.

future_event_fields.name: request_scope
future_event_fields.description: Public-safe route or feed scope, not raw request payloads.

future_event_fields.name: units
future_event_fields.description: Non-negative usage count or quota unit for the event.

future_event_fields.name: result
future_event_fields.description: Coarse accounting result such as accepted, rejected, limited, revoked, suspended, or expired.

idempotency_policy.replay_behavior: A repeated append attempt with the same event_type and idempotency_key must resolve to the original accounting outcome and must not create a second ledger event.

append_only_policy.correction_model: Future corrections must append reversal or adjustment events; they must not mutate previous ledger rows.
append_only_policy.ordering_model: Future consumers must tolerate out-of-order arrival and use occurred_at plus idempotency_key for deterministic reconciliation.

retention_policy.future_minimization: Retain only usage-accounting fields needed for quota, abuse review, and operational reconciliation.

PR90_QA_requirements: Verify metering ledger defaults remain disabled.
Verify no metering runtime route exists.
Verify no billing or payment route is introduced.
Verify no Stripe integration is introduced.
Verify no Supabase migration is introduced.
Verify no Laravel runtime is introduced.
Verify no Redis production config is introduced.
Verify no env secret is introduced.
Verify no key-like committed fixture is introduced.
Verify denied fields and denied statuses remain blocked by contract.
Verify Public API, MCP, sitemap, Featured Signals, Signal Score, Source Confidence, and editorial review outcomes are not altered by metering.

relationships.PR87: Defines the broader API key and metering threat model. PR89 narrows the future usage-accounting ledger contract.
relationships.PR88: Adds a disabled API key shell. PR89 does not enable that shell or issue keys.
relationships.PR90: Must QA the disabled shell and metering ledger contract before any future enablement.
